message:
feat(tui): expand TUI with visual tokens, breakpoint layout parity, and input handling

Major TUI enhancement adding 523 lines to achieve visual and interaction
fidelity parity with the legacy bv viewer:

- Update beads issue tracker with current dependency/status state
- Add visual token rendering and breakpoint-specific layout system
- Expand keyboard interaction handling for modal navigation
- Implement board/insights/graph/history view parity

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
